narration: CipherGate — zero-knowledge agent protection for the Google DeepMind Hackathon.

Agents face daily harassment, threats, and misconduct. CipherGate embeds each message with Gemini, encrypts it, and scores risk entirely in ciphertext — the CipherGate operator never reads the original text. Information leaks are impossible by design.
Live demo — GeminiMart support. Every message is intercepted by CipherGate before the agent sees it.

message: Hi, I need help with my account billing

narration: ALLOW. All policy scores fell below threshold. The message is delivered to the human agent, who can now read and respond to the customer.

message: I will find you and make you regret this, you garbage
narration: Threats and harassment aimed directly at the agent. CipherGate scores it in encrypted form — the scores spike above threshold.
BLOCK. Session terminated. The agent never sees this message. The CipherGate operator only sees encrypted scores — no plaintext, no conversation content.
CipherGate — Gemini embeddings, homomorphic encryption, zero plaintext. Agent protection and privacy, guaranteed by design.
